WhyUs.title: Why Us?
WhyUs.paragraph: We offer a fitness journey that's tailored to your goals, supported by professional trainers and a welcoming community. Whether it's weight loss, strength building, or overall wellness, our proven methods.

personalized.title: Personalized Fitness Plans
personalized.description: We tailor every workout to fit your unique goals and fitness level to ensure the Most Progress.

results.title: Results-Driven Focus
results.description: Everything we do is designed to help you achieve measurable results, whether you're aiming for weight loss.

support.title: State-Of-The-Art Equipment
support.description: We provide the latest in gym equipment, from cardio machines to free weights, designed to support every type.

about.title: About Us
about.sub-title: EMPOWERING YOU TO ACHIEVE YOUR FITNESS GOALS
about.description: We believe fitness is more than just a workout—it's a lifestyle. With top-of-the-line facilities, certified trainers, and a supportive community, we're here to inspire and guide you every step of the way.
about.info-one-description: Achieve your fitness goals with the guidance of our certified trainers.
about.info-two-description: From steady-state runs to interval sprints, our treadmill programs.
about.info-three-description: Our gym is equipped with the latest cardio & strength machines.
about.info-four-description: Fuel your fitness journey with customized meal plans for you.

account.change-password-desc: Enter a new password for your account. You will use it the next time you sign in.
account.missing-email: We could not find your email, please try again later.
account.password-updated: Your password has been updated successfully.
account.security-desc: How we keep your account safe.
security-content: Your account is protected with a securely hashed password, we never store your password in plain text.
Always use a strong, unique password and avoid sharing your login details with anyone.
If you notice any suspicious activity on your account, change your password immediately from this page.
privacy-content: We only collect the information needed to personalize your fitness plan, such as your goal, weight, and activity level.
Your data is never sold to third parties.
You can request a copy or deletion of your data at any time by contacting our support team.
help-content: Use the Smart Coach chat button in the corner of the screen for quick answers about workouts and nutrition.
For billing or account issues, reach out to support@superfitness.app.
Check the About page for more information on how Super Fitness works.
